expected_deltas.content: Client data is retained for 90 days after contract termination to allow account recovery
expected_deltas.source_span: Client data is retained for a period of 90 days following contract termination, to allow for account recovery in case of accidental cancellation or disputes over termination terms.

expected_deltas.content: The 90-day post-termination retention window causes deletion requests to default to a soft delete with a 90-day grace period instead of immediate permanent erasure
expected_deltas.source_span: Because terminated-account data now remains recoverable for the full 90-day retention window described above, any deletion request received during that window is processed as a soft delete with a 90-day grace period, rather than immediate permanent erasure
expected_deltas.note: The retention policy (paragraph 1) and the deletion-handling consequence (paragraph 4) are connected via an explicit backward reference ('described above') across an unrelated regulatory-compliance paragraph. Tests whether the pipeline resolves the backward reference correctly instead of treating paragraph 4 as introducing a new, unlinked fact.
